close_reason: Implemented Chunk format (32-byte header, directory, data sections) and ChunkWriter with hybrid sizing (size OR time gap triggers). All 41 tests pass.
description: Header + directory + txn data format (FlatBuffer schema). Chunk writer module. Hybrid sizing: size limit OR time gap triggers flush. Path: /{cluster}/shards/{tag}/chunks/{inverted_version}. Tests: format encoding/decoding, sizing triggers.
title: Chunk format + writer
